prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-SUPERSTAR-KARAOKE-BLUE Product Type: KARAOKE_MACHINE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Music Karaoke Machine for Kids Microphone Lights Sounds MP3 Player, Blue, Boys Ages 3+ Description: This super fun and interactive karaoke machine for kids with microphone from Kidplokio will have little super stars ready to take center stage. Available in a pink or blue colorway, the music toy playset features a built-in amplifier, adjustable volume control, a telescopic microphone stand, flashing colorful LED lights and has the ability to connect to Apple iPhone's, Samsung and Android devices, as well as other MP3 supported devices, so little budding musical artists can sing along to their favorite tunes.

Built into the adjustable microphone stand (telescopic height from 15.75 to 32.25 inches), is an amplifier speaker to help little singing super stars project their singing voices. It also comes with a built in jack auxiliary input that kids and parents can easily connect to an iPhone, Samsung, Android or other MP3 players, tablets or smartphones, making this fun music toy just like a karaoke machine. The stand also features fun sounds, its own music and even cheers to encourage little performers along.

And, not only will your little budding musical artist have so much creative and self-expression fun during karaoke singing and dancing play time, they'll also be developing intellectual, social-emotional, motor, language and literacy skills; singing and dancing helps the body and the mind work together, while also helping kids and children to learn the sounds and meanings of words too.

Lastly, with its easily portable, compact and lightweight design, the karaoke machine for kids will fit into a backpack, luggage or tote bag parents can take along with them for travel, whether for air travel or neighborhood play dates.

Note: Battery Operated (batteries not included with purchase).
Recommended Ages: 3+
Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts) Search Terms: kids karoke toy for musical entertainers just like mom Toys for Boys Toys for Girls Music Toys Karaoke Machine for Kids Features: - FUN KARAOKE MACHINE FOR KIDS: The music toys playset features a built-in amplifier, adjustable volume control, a telescopic microphone stand, microphone, colorful LED lights and the ability to connect to MP3 capable devices and smartphones! - AWESOME LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: When the curtain lifts, flashing LED lights come on, along with music and even cheering, giving kids the confidence they need to belt out their favorite ballad! Little singing pop stars will steal the show with built in sound amplifier speaker and microphone - EASY MP3 PLAYER COMPATIBILITY: Able to Connect with Apple iPhone, Android and Samsung and other MP3 player capable devices via audio jack and auxiliary cord, kids can sing along to their favorite playlist and songs with this simple and easy to use connection - MUSIC TOYS FOR KIDS DEVELOPMENT: Not only will your little budding musical artist have so much creative fun during karaoke singing and dancing play time as the mind and body learn to work together, they'll also be developing intellectual, social emotional, motor, language and literacy skills too! - SPECIFICATIONS: Package Dimensions: 8.5 x 5 x 32.25 inches; Colors: Pink or Blue; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Note: Batteries Not Included; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
